/usr/bin/c++ -march=native -O3 -g -funroll-loops -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -Wno-sign-compare -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects CMakeFiles/tlwe2trlwepacking.dir/tlwe2trlwepacking.cpp.o -o tlwe2trlwepacking  ../src/libtfhe++.a ../thirdparties/AES/libAES.a ../thirdparties/BLAKE3/c/libblake3.a ../thirdparties/concrete-fft/libconcrete-fft.a -lpthread -ldl ../thirdparties/concrete-fft/release/libconcrete_fft.a
